reasoning: Multiple sources detailing the Chatbot Arena leaderboard in late 2025 and early 2026 consistently indicate that Gemini 3 Pro (released and claiming the #1 spot by mid-December 2025) maintained its position at the top of the leaderboard through the end of the year. An article from February 6, 2026 explicitly stated that Claude Opus 4.6 took the top spot "For the first time since Google's Gemini 3 series established its reign," confirming no other model—including any from DeepSeek—interrupted Gemini 3's reign at the end of December 2025. Also, early 2026 reports list DeepSeek models far down the leaderboard between #34 and #47, making it virtually impossible they were #1 on December 31. This provides definitive evidence against the resolution criteria.
